body_txt: A standard shot, usually done from above via a crane, that shows the character being gloriously and joyously rained on, obviously symbolic of a baptism and a new life/rebirth (or simply having a cleansing shower) . The scene esentially symbolizes his sins and/or pains are being washed away. Most noticeable in the movie The Shawshank Redemption , this trope has been aggressively adopted by TV and these days, you can almost count on some character going through a life-changing event if it's overcast and a low pressure system is moving in. This may or may not be caused by Happy Rain . Compare to Symbolic Baptism . Contrast with Partly Cloudy with a Chance of Death and Cue the Sun .
